$comment: Copy to your project as .claude/ship-cycle.config.json and edit. This overlay supplies ALL project-specific values; the plugin itself stays generic. Nothing here is required — omit a section to use built-in defaults.

design.$comment: Optional. Feeds sc-design's reuse-before-create gate and sc-review's designer lens: point at the design source of truth so UI changes reuse existing tokens/components instead of reinventing them (bespoke empty states, inlined colors, hand-rolled spinners). Omit to have the designer inventory the repo ad hoc.

audit.$comment: Optional. Used by the à-la-carte sc-audit skill. sourceOfTruth = the authoritative contract; surfaces = the consumers checked against it; modules = domain groupings for the parity matrix. Omit to let sc-audit derive these from changeNature and log that defaults are used.

modelRouting.$comment: Optional. tierMap bridges tier names → real model ids the Task tool accepts; the skill passes model=<resolved> per call. base overrides which tier each role runs at.
